title: Minimalist Doodle Ad AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist object-plus-doodle print advertisement built around real photographic red espresso cup, black ink steam turning into a tiny dancing musician, WAKE THE BEAT, and fictional wordmark BEANLOOP. Subject: real photographic red espresso cup is the single real photographic hero object; black ink steam turning into a tiny dancing musician is drawn in loose black ink and physically interacts with the object as if it belongs to the same scene. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed clean print-ad hierarchy: bold all-caps WAKE THE BEAT at the top, real photographic red espresso cup centered in the lower or middle field, black ink steam turning into a tiny dancing musician integrated around the object, and fictional wordmark BEANLOOP centered at the bottom. Signature Elements: Real photo object fused with a black ink doodle interaction, pure white field, strong negative space, high contrast, and a smart visual metaphor. Style: Minimalist commercial advertisement combining a crisp photographic object with flat hand-drawn black ink sketchwork, witty visual metaphor, high contrast, and print-ready art direction. Color Palette: Pure white background, black ink linework, black headline typography, and the real object color as the only strong accent. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Straight-on product-ad view with natural object perspective, clear silhouette, and ample white margins. Materials: The photographic object keeps realistic surface texture while the doodle stays flat, loose, playful, and visibly hand-drawn. Typography: WAKE THE BEAT appears as the bold all-caps black headline at the top; fictional wordmark BEANLOOP appears centered at the bottom as a clean fictional wordmark. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Minimalist object-plus-doodle print advertisement built around real photographic red espresso cup, black ink steam turning into a tiny dancing musician, WAKE THE BEAT, and fictional wordmark BEANLOOP. Subject: real photographic red espresso cup is the single real photographic hero object; black ink steam turning into a tiny dancing musician is drawn in loose black ink and physically interacts with the object as if it belongs to the same scene. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed clean print-ad hierarchy: bold all-caps WAKE THE BEAT at the top, real photographic red espresso cup centered in the lower or middle field, black ink steam turning into a tiny dancing musician integrated around the object, and fictional wordmark BEANLOOP centered at the bottom. Signature Elements: Real photo object fused with a black ink doodle interaction, pure white field, strong negative space, high contrast, and a smart visual metaphor. Style: Minimalist commercial advertisement combining a crisp photographic object with flat hand-drawn black ink sketchwork, witty visual metaphor, high contrast, and print-ready art direction. Color Palette: Pure white background, black ink linework, black headline typography, and the real object color as the only strong accent. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Straight-on product-ad view with natural object perspective, clear silhouette, and ample white margins. Materials: The photographic object keeps realistic surface texture while the doodle stays flat, loose, playful, and visibly hand-drawn. Typography: WAKE THE BEAT appears as the bold all-caps black headline at the top; fictional wordmark BEANLOOP appears centered at the bottom as a clean fictional wordmark. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
